MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Continued To Jan-25-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAHITI SURAPANENI's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiff Sahiti Surapaneni's unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel S. Cody Reinberg may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-08-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
